steps.title: Spot the passage's three-part structure
steps.content: The passage opens by identifying what community science is, moves to listing three concrete benefits, and ends with a real example of that approach in action (Merrill's butterfly study).

steps.title: Match this structure to the choices
steps.content: Choice D names this progression directly: identifies an approach, lists benefits, then mentions a study using it. The other three reverse the sequence, invent missing elements, or mislabel what's actually there. That matches choice D — D is correct.
